problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation may resolve How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
